attacking_style: Attacks opportunistically from small breaks by exploiting tactical dynamics rather than pure power. Prefers early moves that capitalize on rivals' marking behavior and hesitation.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to establish team tactical patterns from single race observation.
terrain_preference: Demonstrated success on finishing circuits where tactical positioning and timing trump pure climbing power. Gap finish suggests comfort on rolling/uphill finishes from reduced groups.
vulnerability: Likely vulnerable in pure sprint scenarios or against pure climbers on sustained steep gradients, given reliance on tactical opportunism over physiological dominance.
key_patterns: Exploits presence of marked riders (sprinters/favorites) to launch counter-moves while rivals hesitate.
Attacks early from small breaks rather than waiting for traditional sprint scenarios.
Demonstrates strong race-reading ability to identify tactical paralysis moments among competitors.
form_trajectory: positive: Won from intelligent tactical play at WorldTour level, suggesting confidence and sharp race intuition in June 2022
